requirements.description: Complete registries, schemas, proof statements, encodings, thresholds, and rollbacks with every orthogonal claim field.
requirements.threshold: 100% required fields; every THEORY claim has a falsifier; independent review
requirements.observed: No immutable independently reviewed G0 stage bundle is registered.

requirements.description: Signed decisions for all owner-controlled identity and production constants.
requirements.threshold: All OWNER_BLOCKED G0 values resolved by signed records
requirements.observed: Address layout and production constants remain OWNER_BLOCKED.

unresolved: Independent G0 reviewer and immutable review evidence

requirements.description: Canonical vectors, mutation/fuzz, small-state checks, cross-language Grain/Weft, model/profile/hardware labs, raw logs, and independent reproduction.
requirements.threshold: Zero false accepts, unauthorized transitions, semantic/root/meter/formula divergence, irreproducible measurements, or weaker tests
requirements.observed: No complete immutable G1 bundle or independent reproduction is registered.

requirements.description: Exact-version independent devnet with two independently managed client/verifier families and all client pairings.
requirements.threshold: >=10000000 differential transitions; A-A/A-B/B-A/B-B; restart/snapshot/reorg/proof/version/unknown-field/fuzz/WAN; 30 simulated AI-blackout days; no valuable assets
requirements.observed: No qualifying external operators or immutable G2 network bundle is registered.

requirements.description: Open public adversarial testnet at exact G2 revision with reproducible binaries and public telemetry.
requirements.threshold: >=90 uninterrupted real days for cryptographic/economic mechanisms and >=30 real days for non-authoritative application mechanisms; simulated time forbidden
requirements.observed: 0 qualifying public-testnet days evidenced; no start date claimed.

requirements.description: Public-testnet base availability/finality with every AI/worker/prover/model/Chorus/Umbra/dream/Reflex process disabled.
requirements.threshold: 7 uninterrupted real public-testnet days; T+10m and simulated days do not count
requirements.observed: 0 qualifying days evidenced.

requirements.description: Funded red team, partitions/blackouts/disable drills, independent consensus/network/state/crypto audit and cryptanalysis.
requirements.threshold: All mandatory reviews delivered for exact revision with no gate-killing result
requirements.observed: No audit, cryptanalysis, funded red-team, or public drill evidence registered.

requirements.description: Publish canonical parameter manifest, then derive chain ID without later ceremony inputs.
requirements.threshold: >=7 uninterrupted published real days; any parameter change restarts the interval and chain ID
requirements.observed: No signed parameter manifest, chain ID, publication time, or quiet-week evidence exists.

requirements.description: Select a published Bitcoin block only after Quiet Week completes.
requirements.threshold: Anchor block publication follows the completed freeze and is independently verified
requirements.observed: No anchor selected; sequencing prerequisite unsatisfied.

requirements.description: Complete signed multiparty production DKG after Quiet Week using independent CSPRNGs and reproduce transcript root.
requirements.threshold: Multiparty ceremony, valid complaints/exclusions, erased ephemeral secrets, independently reproduced DKG root
requirements.observed: No participants, ceremony, transcript, or DKG root exists.

requirements.description: Freeze signed production allocation, maximum supply, issuance, minimum bond, shares, rounding, terminal height, and fee disposition.
requirements.threshold: Owner approval + exhaustive cap/issuance tests + independent economic review + required counsel
requirements.observed: Production economics are deliberately absent; NOOS_TEST only.

requirements.description: Independently reproduce final genesis and execute live T+10m miner/node parity demonstration with all AI off.
requirements.threshold: Matching genesis hash, roots/constants/all-off controls, live blocks/transactions/finality
requirements.observed: Final genesis does not exist.

requirements.description: Capped-value opt-in canary with per-lane exit and one-checkpoint disable.
requirements.threshold: 180 uninterrupted real days without a kill; per-lane and aggregate exposure <=0.1% circulating supply
requirements.observed: 0 qualifying canary days; no valuable canary launched.

requirements.description: Independent exit, blackout, WAN, and saturation drills after every release.
requirements.threshold: Two independently observed exit drills plus all required post-release drills
requirements.observed: No qualifying external drills registered.

requirements.description: Independent builders and hardware vendors reproduce every released supported target and lane envelope.
requirements.threshold: Two independent pinned builders; Windows/Linux x86_64 and native Linux aarch64; required hardware-vendor coverage
requirements.observed: No qualifying external builder or hardware-vendor attestations registered.

unresolved: Production supply value needed for caps

requirements.description: Every exact-version lower gate is passed and immutable.
requirements.threshold: G0,G1,G2,G3,GENESIS,G4 all PASS for exact versions
requirements.observed: All lower gates are BLOCKED.

requirements.description: Every actionable claim has a complete local implementation and freshly executed claim-specific evidence; registry disposition replay is forbidden.
requirements.threshold: 136/136 locally IMPLEMENTED with VERIFIED raw evidence; every negative result executes its falsifier or rollback
requirements.observed: Audit: 31 IMPLEMENTED, 31 PARTIAL, 74 MISSING, 36 with separate external blockers. Release claim matrix is BLOCKED by 105 local gaps.

requirements.description: Independent build, consensus/security, cryptographic, economic, and operations reviews with no unresolved severity-1 finding.
requirements.threshold: All exact-version reviews complete; severity-1 unresolved count = 0
requirements.observed: No qualifying final reviews registered.

requirements.description: Two independent live clients/verifiers, real operator/demand diversity, live-state fallback, builders, operators, and hardware vendors.
requirements.threshold: Published diversity measurements satisfy preregistered limits and real demand evidence
requirements.observed: No production diversity or live-state fallback evidence registered.

requirements.description: Multiparty signatures over the exact promotion ledger, release, genesis, evidence roots, and cutover manifest.
requirements.threshold: All required roles sign identical artifact hashes after all other G5 requirements pass
requirements.observed: Signature set is empty; no sign-off or date is claimed.

owner_decisions.description: Sign exact address version/type/payload layout and vectors.
Sign production allocation, maximum supply, issuance curve, minimum bond, shares, rounding, terminal height, and fee disposition.
Authorize and sign exact domain/origin inventory only after G5; execution remains prohibited before G5.
owner_decisions.resolution_artifact: signed cutover manifest and DNS change record

external_blockers.description: Open independent public operators, red team, audits, and real required durations.
Independent economic review and required counsel for public allocation language.
External 180-day capped-value canary and independently observed drills.
Independent auditors, operators, builders, real builders/users, and hardware vendors.
